arts.ttl: Watch: Pompey Talk - Portsmouth reassurances ahead of bid to unsettle Rams
arts.sum: Pompey Talk returns this week with a host of issues to delve into amid a hectic run of games for John Mousinho's side.

arts.ttl: Thank you very much: Derby reunion with man whose Portsmouth exit for Ipswich transformed Fratton fortunes - and his own career
arts.sum: His Pompey sale effectively bankrolled the recruitment of Colby Bishop - and on Friday night that generous benefactor will come face-to-face with his former club.

arts.ttl: Derby County v Portsmouth injury news: eight doubt and two doubts as decision on defender expected
arts.sum: Pompey travel to Derby’s Pride Park on Friday night looking to extend their unbeaten run to five games.

arts.ttl: Referee from controversial Derby County defeat set for Rams v Portsmouth clash
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. There was also another similar decision that went against Derby for the third goal when a counter-attack started when the Rams had legitimate appeals for a corner when the ball seemed to cross the byline.

arts.ttl: 'Absolutely not' - Paul Warne gives no nonsense response to Derby County question - Derbyshire Live
arts.sum: Paul Warne says squad rotation is one of the most exhausting aspects of his Derby County job and admits some players find it difficult to understand. Derby face their third game in six days tomorrow night when they tackle Portsmouth at Pride Park as they look to round off the week with a win.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne's big dilemma as question looms in predicted Derby County XI v Portsmouth
arts.sum: The midfield three, after their performance against Bournemouth on Tuesday, stands a good chance of being the same after Ben Osborn was given a rest presumably with tomorrow in mind. Nat Phillips has played well in his last two games with the on-loan Liverpool defender comfortably delivering his best performance of the season at Leeds last Saturday.

arts.ttl: He's back: Portsmouth boss lifts lid on two-and-a-half month absence of player the Fratton faithful wanted to see
arts.sum: It had been approaching two-and-a-half months since the Fratton faithful last glimpsed Abdoulaye Kamara in action.

arts.ttl: Derby County v Portsmouth injury latest as duo ruled out
arts.sum: Derby County picked up no fresh injuries following their midweek draw at Burnley as they face a huge game against Portsmouth tomorrow night. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: EFL make official decision ahead of Derby County vs Portsmouth Championship showdown
arts.sum: Portsmouth are unbeaten in their last four matches and are aiming to continue their rise up the table under the lights at Pride Park

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss singles out transfer 'genius' on Derby County staff
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Portsmouth boss John Mousinho has praised Derby County's Mark Thomas and says it was not a surprise to see him end up at Pride Park.
